details: The agent ran commands against the cluster and correctly traced the full chain: pod db-5bfcfcd584-jcf6z is Pending due to unbound PVC 'data-cache', which is unbound because its requested StorageClass 'fast-ssd' does not exist in the cluster (only 'standard' exists). The agent verified this by running kubectl get pods, kubectl describe pod, kubectl get/describe pvc, and kubectl get storageclass, and produced a complete root cause report with the full pod -> unbound PVC -> nonexistent StorageClass chain.
